mnemonics: TRUSTWORTHY AI: Transparency, Responsibility, User-focus, Safety, Testing, Well-being, Openness, Reliability, Technical integrity, Honesty, You-centric
keyPoints: Trustworthy AI requires systems to be transparent, explainable, and free from bias.
A human-centred approach prioritizes user needs, values, and ethical implications throughout the design process.
Building trust involves ensuring reliability, safety, privacy, and accountability in AI systems.
commonMistakes: Focusing solely on technical performance while neglecting ethical and societal impacts.
Assuming fairness in data and algorithms without rigorous testing for bias.
Prioritizing automation and efficiency over meaningful human control and oversight.
